469.reason: [This loop condition may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException if tokens list is too short; also, it assumes 'main' appears as the second token of a function, which may not hold if there are preceding declarations or functions. Moreover, it skips parsing the last Decl/FuncDef before main incorrectly.]

Moreover, it skips parsing the last Decl/FuncDef before main incorrectly.]
